narrative:
Wauseon Five (precinct in Fulton County) has 1,231 registered voters, with 56.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 31.0% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 12.6%, a pronounced Republican lean of 18.4 percentage points.
